name: @bodhiapp/lib-bodhiserver-tests
description: Playwright E2E suite for BodhiApp running against the bodhiserver_dev binary + live Vite dev server.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:run && npm run test:playwright
scripts.e2e:server:test-app-oauth: cd test-oauth-app && npm run build && npx serve dist -s -l 55173
scripts.e2e:server:test-app-mcp: cd test-mcp-oauth-server && npm run build && npm start
scripts.e2e:server:test-app-mcp-dcr: cd test-mcp-oauth-server && npm run build && node dist/index.js --dcr
scripts.e2e:server:test-mcp-auth-header: cd test-mcp-auth-server && npm run build && node dist/index.js --header Authorization="Bearer test-header-key" --port 55176
scripts.e2e:server:test-mcp-auth-query: cd test-mcp-auth-server && npm run build && node dist/index.js --query api_key=test-query-key --port 55177
scripts.e2e:server:test-mcp-auth-mixed: cd test-mcp-auth-server && npm run build && node dist/index.js --header X-Auth-1=header-val-1 --header X-Auth-2=header-val-2 --query q_key_1=query-val-1 --query q_key_2=query-val-2 --port 55178
